banner.heading:
Plan Your
Journey
banner.subtitle: We respond within 24 hours — usually much sooner

items.detail: Our main office — handling all Char Dham packages, taxi bookings, tour planning, and customer support from the heart of Uttarakhand's capital.
Coordination point for all river rafting, bungee, camping, and adventure packages operating from the Yoga Capital of the World.
Ground team along the Char Dham Yatra route assisting pilgrims at key checkpoints from Guptkashi to the shrine.

items.question: When is the best time for Char Dham Yatra?
items.answer: The shrines open in April/May and close in October/November. May–June and September–October are ideal — post-monsoon views are spectacular.

items.question: How do I book a Kedarnath helicopter?
items.answer: Contact us directly. We handle all bookings, permits, and shuttles from Phata/Sirsi helipad. Advance booking is strongly recommended.

items.question: Do you offer custom group packages?
items.answer: Yes — groups of all sizes. We customize itineraries, negotiate group hotel rates, and arrange dedicated vehicles and guides.

items.question: What is your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Full refund for cancellations 15+ days before departure. Partial refund within 7–14 days. We also help reschedule where possible.
